items.html: It follows that the very body of Malchut is made of the Gevurot called BON [52], which were extended through the posterior of ZA [Zeir Anpin]; but her actual Nefesh — the Gevurot themselves — is given only at the time of the first Zivug [coupling]. And since her husband took them first, in the Daat in him, it is impossible for them to come to her except through her husband at the time of the Zivug; and then those Gevurot stand there always, like the leaven that leavens the dough. And no MAN [Mayin Nukvin] can be raised except by their hands: for each time that other MAN and other Gevurot come, from them the form of the newborn is depicted — and they themselves are the newborn itself.
